title: Responses API provider parity audit and test hardening
description:
Goal: bring the new OpenAI Responses API / Codex provider path up to the same reliability level as the Anthropic path.

Scope:
- Investigate current provider compatibility for the new Responses API provider in this repo
- Audit existing unit + integration test coverage for the Responses API path
- Add missing test infrastructure parity: integration framework support comparable to Anthropic's mock API, cache validation, prefix validation, and realistic restart/resume validation
- Add whatever tests and fixes are needed so the Responses API path has the same level of support and confidence as Anthropic

Constraints:
- This should be handled as a single parent task that decomposes itself into sub tasks as needed
- The executing agent should act as a sub-orchestrator: first investigate architecture + test gaps, then create focused sub tasks, then merge and validate
- Follow test-is-golden strictly; for any bug fix discovered, write the failing test first
- Work across the relevant Responses API provider, auth/config wiring, test-utils/mock API, integration tests, and any shared provider-loop code as needed

Why:
The user explicitly wants the newly added Responses API / Codex path to reach honest parity with Anthropic in provider support and testing rigor. Focus on the new Responses API path, not the legacy OpenAI-compatible path except where shared infrastructure or compatibility shims require changes.
